title: Kureha Explains the Doctor’s Rules
description: On pages 9–11, kureha explains the doctor’s rules as nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him.
scene: Kureha Explains the Doctor’s Rules. Nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But even so,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Would you like to come along with us?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: to the seas, I mean! How about it?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It'd really help me out a lot.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: If we only had a doctor onboard, I wouldn't need to stay here for 3 more days, right? We could leave right aw-

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: compassioneseseseses the consequences of

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: D-Don't be stupid!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm a Reindeer! How could I ever travel along with humans!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Besides...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A-aren't you scared of how I look...?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I'm a Reindeer but I talk and walk on two legs...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Haha,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Trying to scare me now?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And my nose is blue too...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Found you, Reindeer!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Gya- A.A.!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Stop!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Tap

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fast little buggers, those two...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And you're no better than your rowdy crewmates, missy...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: trying to abduct my Reindeer while I'm gone, are you now...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Since when does a lady need permission,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: to practice her art of sed- action?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee he

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Well said! Take him away if you want!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: But I'll have you know,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: It's going to take a lot more than a warm smile and an invitation.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: His heart's still severely wounded...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: A WOUND NOT EVEN A DOCTOR CAN FIX...
